heading: Special committee to review inventory, identification, and return of Indian human remains and Indian funerary objects

children.text: with respect to the inventory and identification, ensure fair and objective consideration and assessment of all relevant evidence;
upon the request of any affected party or otherwise, review any finding relating to the origin or the return of such remains or objects;
facilitate the resolution of any dispute that may arise between Indian tribes with respect to the return of such remains or objects; and
perform such other related functions as the Secretary may assign.
4 members shall be appointed from among nominations submitted by Indian tribes and organizations;
at least 2 members shall be traditional Indian religious leaders; and
the Secretary shall designate one member as chairman.

children.heading: Access
children.label: c Access
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that the members of the committee have full and free access to the Indian human remains and Indian funerary objects subject to and to any related evidence, including scientific and historical documents.section 80q–9 of this title

children.heading: Pay and expenses of members
children.label: d Pay and expenses of members

children.text: be paid the daily equivalent of the annual rate of basic pay payable for grade GS–18 of the General schedule under ; andsection 5332 of title 5

be entitled (to the same extent as provided in section 5703 of such title, with respect to employees serving intermittently in the Government service) to per diem, travel, and transportation expenses;

children.heading: Rules and administrative support
children.label: e Rules and administrative support
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe regulations and provide administrative support for the committee.

children.heading: Report and termination
children.label: f Report and termination
children.text: At the conclusion of the work of the committee, the Secretary shall be so certify by report to the Congress. The committee shall cease to exist 120 days after the submission of the report.1So in original. Probably should be “shall so”.1

children.heading: Nonapplicability of chapter 10 of title 5
children.label: g Nonapplicability of chapter 10 of title 5
children.text: Chapter 10 of title 5 shall not apply to the committee.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: h Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated $250,000 for fiscal year 1991 and such sums as may be necessary for succeeding fiscal years to carry out this section.
